project_type: Next.js 16 app (TypeScript, React 19, Tailwind CSS v4)
build_system: npm (package-lock.json present, pnpm-lock.yaml also present but npm is primary). Node 20 available at /opt/toolchains/.nvm/versions/node/v20.20.2/bin
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to ensure deps resolve. 2. Run tsc --noEmit for type checking. 3. Run npm run build for Next.js production build.
environment_constraints: No node binary in default PATH - must prepend /opt/toolchains/.nvm/versions/node/v20.20.2/bin to PATH. node_modules not installed yet.
contribution_requirements: Standard Next.js patterns. API routes in app/api/ using route.ts. Components in components/features/. Lib utilities in lib/.
key_patterns: API routes follow pattern: validate input, verify Pro subscription via lib/paypal, call external AI service, fallback to local logic on error, return JSON response. Frontend components fetch from /api/azure/* routes. Pro/Free tier gating is preserved in all routes.
directory_structure: app/api/ - API route handlers; app/tools/ - page components for tool pages; components/features/ - client-side UI components; lib/ - utilities and hooks
